channel.title: Aws-Lambda on Arrans github.io
channel.description: Recent content in Aws-Lambda on Arrans github.io

item.title: nzoschke/gofaas
item.description: A boilerplate Go and AWS Lambda app. Demonstrates an expert configuration of 10+ AWS services to support running Go functions-as-a-service (FaaS).

item.title: 0x4447/0x4447_product_s3_email
item.description: 📫 A serverless email server on AWS using S3 and SES

item.title: apex/gateway
item.description: Drop-in replacement for Go net/http when running in AWS Lambda & API Gateway

item.title: toshke/dotnetcore-lambda-example
item.description: Demo project for simple lambda function written in dotnetcore
